activated_rules.rule_name: Certificate selected from certificate file and invoice selected from separate invoice file
Pairing validation passed because certificate consignor and consignee are both identifiable in the invoice
At least one explicit quantity statement in the certificate is verifiable in the invoice without contradiction

consignor.certificate_value:
Elof Hansson Trade AB
Första Långgatan 17
41380, Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Elof Hansson Trade AB
Första Långgatan 17
SE-413 80 Göteborg,Sweden
consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' is explicitly identifiable in the invoice header/footer as 'Elof Hansson Trade AB'. Country is 'Sweden' in the certificate and 'Sweden' in the invoice. Differences in postal formatting ('41380' vs 'SE-413 80') do not affect the result because consignor verification is based on company name and country under rules 4.1.0, 4.1.4 and 4.1.5.

consignee.certificate_value:
Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.
No. 8, Dan Chu Street, Singapore
Industrial Park II, Binh Duong ward
Ho Chi Minh City Vietnam
Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value:
Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.
No. 8, Dan Chu Street, Singapore Industrial
Park II, Binh Duong ward
Ho Chi Minh City
Vietnam
consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee is explicitly identifiable in the invoice 'BUYER' field as the same company, 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.'. Country 'Viet Nam' in the certificate matches 'Vietnam' in the invoice after allowed country-name normalization. Address line wrapping differs, but consignee verification is based on the same legal party and matching country under rules 4.2.0, 4.2.2, 4.2.3 and 4.2.4.

4 x 40' containers
416 bales

NBSK Sodra Blue Z
Bleached softwood kraft pulp

goods_description.invoice_value:
NBSK Sodra Blue Z
HS Code: 47032100, FSC CONTROLLED WOOD SAI-CW-010913, 100 % PEFC CERTIFIED ICSE-PEFC–COC-1701435
Bleached softwood kraft pulp
Contract No. 00000031_26
B/L No. MEDUUX790030
4 x 40' containers
416 bales
Gross weight: 105,300 tons
Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt
goods_description.motivation: No article number is stated in the certificate, so controlled text matching was applied. The identity-bearing product designation 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z' appears explicitly in the invoice, and the supporting description 'Bleached softwood kraft pulp' also appears explicitly. Additional invoice text such as HS code and B/L number does not change product identity. The certificate description is therefore verifiable in the invoice under rules 4.3.2, 4.3.3, 4.3.4 and 4.3.8.

quantity.motivation: The certificate explicitly states 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt' in the goods section, and the invoice explicitly states the same text 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt'. The numeric value is therefore directly identifiable in the invoice without calculation, conversion or exception 3A-3E. No contradictory quantity statement was found in the invoice. Quantity is matched under rules 4.4.2.2, 4.4.3, 4.4.3.1 and 4.4.6.

origin.motivation: Certificate box 3 states origin 'Sweden'. The invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN Sweden'. The origin is therefore positively and explicitly verified in the invoice under rules 4.5.1 and 4.5.5.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: The certificate file contains both ORIGINAL and COPY pages; the ORIGINAL certificate was used. The invoice was taken from the separate invoice file. The document pair passes pairing validation because the certificate consignor and consignee are both identifiable in the invoice. All applicable control points match: consignor Elof Hansson Trade AB / Sweden, consignee Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd. / Vietnam, goods description 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z / Bleached softwood kraft pulp', quantity '104,000 admt' as explicit Net/Airdry weight, and origin Sweden. No LC exception applied, no contradiction was identified, and the pair is eligible for auto-approval.
